hooks.command: jq -c '{timestamp: (now | todate), session_id: .session_id, total_cost_usd: .cost.total_cost_usd, total_tokens: .cost.total_tokens, duration_ms: .cost.total_duration_ms}' >> ~/.claude/session-costs.jsonl

statusLine.command:
input=$(cat); MODEL=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); DIR=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); COST=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_cost_usd // 0'); PCT=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // 0' | cut -d. -f1); DURATION_MS=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_duration_ms // 0'); FIVE_HR_PCT=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // empty' | cut -d. -f1); FIVE_HR_RESET=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.resets_at // empty'); SEVEN_DAY_PCT=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage // empty' | cut -d. -f1); CYAN='\033[36m'; GREEN='\033[32m'; YELLOW='\033[33m'; RED='\033[31m'; MAGENTA='\033[35m'; RESET='\033[0m'; if [ "$PCT" -ge 90 ]; then BAR_COLOR="$RED"; elif [ "$PCT" -ge 70 ]; then BAR_COLOR="$YELLOW"; else BAR_COLOR="$GREEN"; fi; MINS=$((DURATION_MS / 60000)); SECS=$(((DURATION_MS % 60000) / 1000)); BRANCH=''; git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1 && BRANCH=" | 🌿 $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)"; printf '%b
' "${CYAN}[$MODEL]${RESET} 📁 ${DIR##*/}$BRANCH"; if [ -n "$FIVE_HR_PCT" ]; then if [ "$FIVE_HR_PCT" -ge 80 ]; then FIVE_COLOR="$RED"; elif [ "$FIVE_HR_PCT" -ge 50 ]; then FIVE_COLOR="$YELLOW"; else FIVE_COLOR="$GREEN"; fi; if [ -n "$SEVEN_DAY_PCT" ]; then if [ "$SEVEN_DAY_PCT" -ge 80 ]; then SEVEN_COLOR="$RED"; elif [ "$SEVEN_DAY_PCT" -ge 50 ]; then SEVEN_COLOR="$YELLOW"; else SEVEN_COLOR="$GREEN"; fi; else SEVEN_COLOR="$GREEN"; SEVEN_DAY_PCT='--'; fi; RESET_STR=''; if [ -n "$FIVE_HR_RESET" ]; then RESET_STR=" (resets $(date -r "$FIVE_HR_RESET" '+%-I:%M %p'))"; fi; printf '%b
' "context: ${BAR_COLOR}${PCT}%${RESET} | 5h: ${FIVE_COLOR}${FIVE_HR_PCT}%${RESET}${RESET_STR} | 7d: ${SEVEN_COLOR}${SEVEN_DAY_PCT}%${RESET}"; else printf '%b
' "context: ${BAR_COLOR}${PCT}%${RESET}"; fi; COST_FMT=$(printf '$%.2f' "$COST"); printf '%b
' "${YELLOW}${COST_FMT}${RESET} | ⏱️ ${MINS}m ${SECS}s"
